{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Kameira limbs
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Imperial Guards]] possess [[Kameira limbs]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kameira limbs]] are part of the [[Imperial Guards]]' uniforms or appearance.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
